description: Babysitter hook registration for Oh-My-Pi. Maps Oh-My-Pi extension events to unified babysitter hook scripts with hooks-mux support.

session_start.description: Initialize babysitter session state and inject context (proxied via a5c-hooks-mux)

tool_call.description: Pre-tool-use hook for babysitter awareness (proxied via a5c-hooks-mux)

context.description: Context injection for babysitter orchestration (proxied via a5c-hooks-mux)

before_provider_request.description: Before provider request hook for babysitter observability (proxied via a5c-hooks-mux)

stop.description: Check for pending babysitter effects when agent completes a turn (proxied via a5c-hooks-mux)
